name: Trout or Bass in Beer Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté diced onion in hot oil until it becomes translucent.
2. Add flour to onions and stir constantly, cooking for 2 minutes.
3. Add beer, brown sugar, pepper, and Worcestershire sauce to the skillet and heat until the sauce thickens. Stir constantly.
4. Carefully place fish pieces in the skillet.
5. Cook until the fish flakes easily with a fork.
